scope: Canonical ResourceIntent fields, labels, bounds, and canonicalization owned by draft-hyprstream-resource-attestation-00. This file is not an IANA registry, a 9P opcode, a MoQ track namespace, a Privacy Pass token type, or a codepoint allocation, and it implies no such allocation.

canonicalization.encoding: DAG-CBOR: RFC 8949 deterministic CBOR with the atproto map-key length-prefixed lexicographic byte sort and tag-42 CID representation
canonicalization.digest: SHA-256 over the canonical encoding, wrapped by the multihash 0x12 identifier
canonicalization.identifiers: byte strings; resource_id, content_cid, manifest_cid, and operation_id are independent values (no cyclic hash or signature construction)
canonicalization.integers: canonical minimum-width CBOR encoding; no leading zeros; nonnegative only
canonicalization.octets: byte strings rendered as lowercase hex in this registry and vectors only for readability; the canonical on-the-wire form is a CBOR bstr
canonicalization.boundary: reject an unknown field, an unknown label, a non-canonical encoding, or an out-of-bounds value before attestation or registrar processing

resource_id.selection_requirement: Stable resource identity. MUST be independent of content_cid, manifest_cid, and operation_id. Concrete generation (random, UUID, or DID-derived) is pending #1065 and MUST NOT be defined as a hash or signature over another identifier.

content_cid.selection_requirement: Content-addressed digest of the sealed blob bytes. MUST match the bytes sealed by the content-addressed store (#1066).

manifest_cid.selection_requirement: Self-addressed digest of the canonical manifest encoding, distinct from content_cid and resource_id. Pending #1065.

operation_id.selection_requirement: Deterministic operation identifier. Two transitions for one operation_id MUST NOT both finalize. Pending #1065/#1069.

predecessor_version.selection_requirement: Expected predecessor version for compare-and-swap. Pending #1069 registrar saga.

owner_ref.selection_requirement: Encoded OwnershipRef: identified, pairwise, or committed. Anonymous authorization MUST NOT fabricate a DID. Pending #1065/#1068.

controller_ref.selection_requirement: Encoded ControllerRef: identified or anonymous-capability. Pending #1068.

payer_ref.selection_requirement: Encoded PayerRef: identified or anonymous-entitlement. Pending #1072.

profile.selection_requirement: One of the distinct profiles in resource-vocabulary.json. Unknown profile kinds reject. Pending #1067/#1070.

mac_attestation.selection_requirement: MAC title/control attestation. Its covered_digest field MUST equal the canonical ResourceIntent digest. Pending #1068.

ledger_attestation.selection_requirement: Ledger economic attestation. Its covered_digest field MUST equal the same canonical ResourceIntent digest as mac_attestation. Pending #1072.

accepted_state_epoch.selection_requirement: Accepted-current state epoch bound to the attestation. Stale or rolled-back values reject. Pending #1069.

accepted_state_digest.selection_requirement: Digest of the accepted-current registrar state. Pending #1069.

policy_generation.selection_requirement: MAC policy generation. Policy rollback reject. Pending #1068.

expiry.selection_requirement: Unix-seconds expiry. Expired or crossed attestations reject. Pending #1065.

labels.purpose: Canonical ResourceIntent over which both the MAC and the ledger attestations are computed.
Finalized manifest joining both attestations over the identical canonical ResourceIntent digest.

bounds.note: Repository-local application ceilings. Construction and profile review may lower them; any increase requires a profile revision.

construction_status.reason: The canonical production ResourceIntent encoding, durable registrar, reviewed MAC title attestation, and reviewed ledger redemption do not yet exist. A structurally valid fixture still terminates with the ConstructionIncomplete refusal.
